meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (mantle)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0x56a6671cC4933BF71D68541918aafe375E17a1E9 on mantle. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
